option_labels: Deploy — configure EmailJS auto-responder for waitlist signups with response timing expectations
context: From ra_agent_roundtable_daily_adversarial_2026_03_22: Auto-responder proposed 3 sessions ago, still not deployed. With CTAs now updated to 'Join Our Waitlist' site-wide, a form submission without any confirmation degrades trust. Need: (1) auto-responder email copy approved, (2) EmailJS template configured. This is decoupled from inbox owner decision — auto-responder can go live independently.
